name: Code Trace to LLR
description: Source code is developed from, and traces to, the low-level requirements.
rationale: DO-178C Table A-2 obj 6 & A-5 obj 5: source code is developed from low-level requirements; traceability is established through the artifact lineage.

examples.fails: the required objective evidence is absent

source: RTCA DO-178C / EUROCAE ED-12C — Software Considerations in Airborne Systems and Equipment Certification; objectives per Annex A tables A-1 to A-10.
